description.ko: 네온 조명으로 뒤덮인 거대한 미래 도시의 전경. 하늘을 나는 자동차, 거대한 고층 빌딩, 그리고 디지털 디스토피아를 반사하는 비에 젖은 거리가 특징입니다.
description.en: A sprawling futuristic cityscape bathed in neon lights, featuring flying vehicles, towering skyscrapers, and rain-slicked streets reflecting a digital dystopia.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, heavy rain, glowing neon signs in vibrant blue, magenta, and amber, flying cars with light trails moving between massive skyscrapers, dense fog, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, synthwave aesthetic, intricate futuristic architecture, rain-slicked streets reflecting the neon glow.
